description: 广州市第二中学应元校区的正门，黑色大理石建筑与金色校名题字，体现百年名校的历史底蕴。

strategy.thinking: The strategy focuses on the specific campus (Yingyuan) and the primary architectural subject (the gate) using both the official Chinese name and the English designation to capture professional institutional photography.
queries: 广州二中 应元 校门
strategy.guidance: Select a high-resolution photograph that clearly displays the black marble texture and the golden calligraphy of the school name to reflect its historical prestige.

reasoning: img_1.jpg clearly depicts the black marble wall and the golden calligraphy of the school name '广州市第二中学' at the Yingyuan Road campus, as requested. It is a high-resolution, professional-looking photograph that captures the historical prestige of the institution without distracting elements like the cyclist in img_3.
selected_image_description: 广州市第二中学应元路校区正门，黑色大理石墙面上镶嵌着金色的校名题字。
